steps.title: Identify the growth multiplier
steps.content: An 8% annual increase means each year the population is 1.08 times the previous year (100% + 8% = 108% = 1.08). Starting value: 3,000 in 2007.

steps.title: Build the exponential formula
steps.content:
After $x$ years of 8% growth:
Year 1: $p = 3,000(1.08)^1$
Year 2: $p = 3,000(1.08)^2$
Year $x$: $$p = 3,000(1.08)^x$$
This matches choice D — D is correct.
